subcodes.title: Words to Percy Woodcock in Ramleh, ca. Mar. 1911
subcodes.first_line: I have a few friends in different cities who love Me.... When you return to America, call together those sincere souls who have asked this question
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @freedom of thought and action, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
